subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all mention and utterance, befitteth Him Who is the Purpose of all creation, Who through one blessed and exalted Word [3.5s]... ...Praise be to Thee, O Lord my God, for guiding me unto the horizon of Thy Revelation and for causing me to be mentioned by Thy Name.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود امکان را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه مبارکه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
